title: Asukas right arm remark in Episode 13
display_title: Asukas right arm remark in Episode 13
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's right arm remark in Episode 13             Quote Post by funeral_fog » Mon Dec 27, 2010 4:26 pm Ahoyhoy! I'm new here, so apologies if this has been discussed before or if it's in the wrong place. In Episode 13 the pilots are placed within simulation bodies, and while inside Asuka remarks about everything but her right arm feeling fuzzy. As we're all aware her right arm eventually gets split in half in End of Evangelion. Is there anything to be made of this? I'd love to hear your thoughts! because I haven't got a clue..

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Dec 27, 2010 4:33 pm That's because the test bodies are incomplete. The right arm of the test body is the only appendage still attached. The fuzz I'm guessing must be somewhat akin to phantom limb. I don't think this really fits into Anno's left-arm-and-right-eye injury motif, because the rest of the body just isn't there, and there's no head or eye to speak of.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Dec 27, 2010 5:07 pm Combs wrote: That's because the test bodies are incomplete.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Dec 28, 2010 4:38 am FWIW, arms being damaged is a motif in the series (all the pilots/Evas receive arm/eye damage).

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Dec 28, 2010 4:06 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: FWIW, arms being damaged is a motif in the series (all the pilots/Evas receive arm/eye damage).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 28, 2010 5:15 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Though I don't think that Asuka's fuzzy feeling is a foreshadowing or otherwise related to her arm getting split down the middle in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Dec 29, 2010 5:09 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Well, limbs in general. Toji's right leg was also amputated in episode 20. It does seem that Anno is metaphorically slowly cutting off the characters' attack motifs. And one can theorize that Asuka's right arm feeling fuzzy is a metaphoric clue that what NERV was testing probably wasn't combat ready yet. Though I don't think that Asuka's fuzzy feeling is a foreshadowing or otherwise related to her arm getting split down the middle in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Dec 29, 2010 9:16 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: It's also a reference to old Jewish Kaballah.

[]: Re: Asuka's right arm remark in Episode 13             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Thu Dec 30, 2010 12:23 am funeral_fog wrote: Ahoyhoy! I'm new here, so apologies if this has been discussed before or if it's in the wrong place. In Episode 13 the pilots are placed within simulation bodies, and while inside Asuka remarks about everything but her right arm feeling fuzzy. As we're all aware her right arm eventually gets split in half in End of Evangelion. Is there anything to be made of this? I'd love to hear your thoughts! because I haven't got a clue..

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Thu Dec 30, 2010 1:47 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: It's also a reference to old Jewish Kaballah.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 30, 2010 2:55 pm Aozora wrote: And what is that reference?
